text:
Market today: The market's pulled in two directions: strong tech/AI news (Nvidia) suggests bullish momentum, but a stark warning about an "AI bubble" and potential market fallout creates a cautious undertone. Geopolitical tensions (Iran) add to the uncertainty.

Your holdings: SOXL is down nearly 35% and leveraged, requiring immediate attention. SPAL, a brand-new leveraged ETF, is also down significantly at -37.57% and needs close monitoring. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on your leveraged positions (SOXL, SPAL) and any further news on AI bubble warnings.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged risk aggressively while staying alert for opportunities in core tech names.
plays: SOXL: Your stop at 200 is way above current price. Given its -34.95% loss and leveraged decay, consider trimming or exiting if it can't recover soon.
SPAL: This new leveraged ETF is already down -37.57%. Respect your stop at 21.38; if it breaks, exit to prevent further margin pain.
NVDA: With its AI news, consider watching for a potential long entry at 210.67-210.41 with a stop at 209.48, as per scanner.
